title: Pleurothallis helleriana
taxonomy: Pleurothallis helleriana is classified as a species of orchid within the genus Pleurothallis, and more specifically, it belongs to the family Orchidaceae. This genus is part of the subfamily Epidendroideae. The species is native to South America, where it can be found growing in humid and shaded environments. The classification of Pleurothallis helleriana is further supported by its unique characteristics, such as its small size and delicate white flowers. Within the Orchidaceae family, Pleurothallis helleriana is categorized as an epiphytic orchid.
